channel.title: GitHub ZenScript Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of ZenScript in GitHub

item.title: mahjerion/Craft-to-Exile-Dissonance
item.description: A Minecraft modpack that aims to turn MC into an ARPG similar to Path of Exile and Diablo II. Focused progression and exploration is the main goal of the modpack.

item.title: ET-Team/EnigTech2
item.description: 大型集成科魔类魔改整合包
